system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_getall8","body":" CREATE PROC [dbo].[PS_KEHOACH_DONHANG_GETALL8] ( @nam INT, @thang INT, @bophan nvarchar(max) --@trangthai nvarchar(max) ) AS BEGIN --DECLARE @nam INT = 2026; --DECLARE @thang INT = 1; --DECLARE @bophan nvarchar(max) = 'SON, DGO, SON1, SON2'; --DECLARE @trangthai nvarchar(max) SELECT * INTO #GRIDCOLUMN FROM tr_gridview_column WHERE mabophan IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@bophan, ',')) AND formName = 'frmKeHoachSanXuatPO2' AND COALESCE(isText, 0) = 0 DECLARE @prev_year int; DECLARE @prev_month int; IF @thang = 1 BEGIN SET @prev_year = @nam - 1; SET @prev_month = 12; END ELSE BEGIN SET @prev_year = @nam; SET @prev_month = @thang - 1 END SELECT * INTO #KEHOACH FROM ( SELECT A.sapxep, A.lansanxuat, A.madonhang, A.columnName, A.typeID, A.soluong_kehoach, A.socont_kehoach, A.sokhoi_kehoach, ngaykehoach = CASE WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYBATDAU' THEN N'B.đầu: ' + FORMAT(A.ngaykehoach, N'dd/MM/yyyy') WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYKETTHUC' THEN N'K.thúc: ' + FORMAT(A.ngaykehoach, N'dd/MM/yyyy') WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYHOANTHANH' THEN N'H.thành: ' + FORMAT(A.ngaykehoach, N'dd/MM/yyyy') ELSE NULL END --INTO #KEHOACH FROM ps_kehoach_donhang A WHERE A.dondathang IS NULL --AND A.trangthai IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@trangthai, ',')) AND A.columnName IN (SELECT columnName FROM #GRIDCOLUMN) AND A.typeID IN ('NGAYBATDAU', 'NGAYKETTHUC', 'NGAYHOANTHANH') AND YEAR(A.ngaykehoach) = @nam AND MONTH(A.ngaykehoach) = @thang UNION ALL SELECT A.sapxep, A.lansanxuat, A.madonhang, A.columnName, A.typeID, A.soluong_kehoach, A.socont_kehoach, A.sokhoi_kehoach, ngaykehoach = CASE WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYBATDAU' THEN N'B.đầu: ' + FORMAT(A.ngaykehoach, N'dd/MM/yyyy') WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYKETTHUC' THEN N'K.thúc: ' + FORMAT(A.ngaykehoach, N'dd/MM/yyyy') WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYHOANTHANH' THEN N'H.thành: ' + FORMAT(A.ngaykehoach, N'dd/MM/yyyy') ELSE NULL END --INTO #KEHOACH FROM ps_kehoach_donhang A WHERE A.dondathang IS NULL AND A.trangthai IN ('5', '6') AND A.columnName IN (SELECT columnName FROM #GRIDCOLUMN) AND A.typeID IN ('NGAYBATDAU', 'NGAYKETTHUC') AND YEAR(A.ngaykehoach) IN (@nam, @prev_year) AND MONTH(A.ngaykehoach) <= @prev_month ) A SELECT A.order_number, A.customer AS makhachhang, A.[range] AS hehang, SUM(B.order_qty) AS order_qty, ROUND(SUM(B.order_qty * C.cbm)/68, 1) AS cont_qty, SUM(B.order_qty * C.m3_tc) AS m3_tc INTO #DONHANG FROM tr_order A INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number INNER JOIN tr_sanpham C ON B.item_number = C.masp WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT madonhang FROM #KEHOACH) GROUP BY A.order_number, A.customer, A.[range] SELECT A.sapxep, A.lansanxuat, A.madonhang, A.makhachhang, A.hehang, A.columnName, soluong_donhang = SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_donhang), soluong_kehoach = SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_kehoach), sokhoi_kehoach = SUM(DISTINCT A.sokhoi_kehoach), socont_kehoach = SUM(DISTINCT A.socont_kehoach), ngaykehoach = STRING_AGG(A.ngaykehoach, '
') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYBATDAU' THEN 1 WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYKETTHUC' THEN 2 WHEN A.typeID = 'NGAYHOANTHANH' THEN 3 END) INTO #KEHOACH2 FROM ( SELECT A.sapxep, A.lansanxuat, A.madonhang, B.makhachhang, B.hehang, A.columnName, A.typeID, B.order_qty AS soluong_donhang, soluong_kehoach = COALESCE(A.soluong_kehoach, B.order_qty), sokhoi_kehoach = COALESCE(A.sokhoi_kehoach, B.m3_tc), socont_kehoach = COALESCE(A.socont_kehoach, B.cont_qty), A.ngaykehoach FROM #KEHOACH A LEFT JOIN #DONHANG B ON A.madonhang = B.order_number ) A GROUP BY A.sapxep, A.lansanxuat, A.madonhang, A.makhachhang, A.hehang, A.columnName ORDER BY A.sapxep, A.madonhang, A.lansanxuat --SELECT A.* FROM #KEHOACH2 A DECLARE @columns nvarchar(max); DECLARE @sql nvarchar(max); SELECT @columns = COALESCE(@columns + ', ', '') + QUOTENAME(columnName) FROM #GRIDCOLUMN SET @sql = ' SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.sapxep, A.lansanxuat, A.madonhang, A.makhachhang, A.hehang, A.soluong_donhang, A.soluong_kehoach, A.sokhoi_kehoach, A.socont_kehoach, A.columnName, A.ngaykehoach FROM #KEHOACH2 A ) A PIVOT ( MAX(ngaykehoach) FOR columnName IN (' + @columns + ') ) PV ORDER BY PV.sapxep, PV.lansanxuat, PV.madonhang ' EXECUTE sp_executesql @sql; SELECT * FROM #GRIDCOLUMN ORDER BY visibleIndex DROP TABLE #GRIDCOLUMN, #DONHANG, #KEHOACH, #KEHOACH2; END ","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table","dynamic-sql"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
